items.title: Superadmins Can Now Access Secure Windows Viewer in Frontend Web 🔐
items.summary: Added a Windows Viewer (VNC) operations card to Deployment Management that is visible only to platform superadmins. The interface displays validated HTTPS viewer details with masked and revealable credentials, copy actions, and a quick-open button while enforcing frontend access checks. The update also extends deployment models and adds localization support across all target languages.

items.title: Harden Wisdom access controls and health checks in Backend 🔒
items.summary: Updated deployment health handling so API readiness can remove unhealthy services while TCP liveness allows the in-guest supervisor to recover without restarting Windows workloads. Added consistent redaction of viewer credentials, host tokens, and sensitive deployment fields for non-superusers across application responses and history serialization. Added focused tests covering access filtering, manifest probe behavior, and safe metadata handling.

items.title: Prevent API hangs by isolating UI checks in Wisdom 🛡️
items.summary: Moved synchronous WeChat UI inspection work off the FastAPI event loop to keep health endpoints responsive during login and status checks. Added API health handling and updated deployment probes so readiness uses HTTP checks while liveness keeps a TCP fallback. Extended startup handling and added resilience tests to validate recovery without restarting Windows or the active WeChat session.

items.title: Enhance Audio Control in Platform Service 🎶
items.summary: This update pins the HyperFrames audio volume contract in Maestro's delivery prompt, ensuring static BGM levels are set correctly and playback controls are restricted. A new MP4 is required after any audio mix changes to prevent reuse of prior outputs. The changes have been validated with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Enhance Aichat2 with Durable Waits in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a robust runtime design for Aichat2, featuring durable waits that improve task management without relying on extended HTTP timeouts. Key enhancements include the implementation of fenced leases, conversation revisions, and idempotent billing segments, ensuring better orchestration and state management. The proposal aims to streamline long-running tasks and improve overall system resilience.

items.title: Enhance Design System Consistency in Index 🎨
items.summary: This update focuses on auditing the design system consistency across Nexior, PlatformFrontend, and AuthFrontend. Key findings include a significant number of inconsistent border-radius declarations and color usages across 723 Vue SFCs. The proposal outlines a unified approach to design tokens and component libraries, aiming for a more cohesive user experience without altering existing product UI code.

items.title: Enhance Image URL Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to detect and promote safe HTTPS image URLs embedded in user messages to OpenAI-compatible image blocks. Key changes include the implementation of safety checks, URL parsing, and a cap on the number of inferred image URLs. The original user text is preserved while ensuring that inferred image blocks do not persist in memory history.

items.title: Enhance Language Selection for Maestro in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the Maestro language selection by replacing raw language codes with localized names and separating the primary language from optional outputs. It also preserves the API contract while normalizing legacy values and includes responsive styling, locale coverage, and regression tests to ensure functionality.

items.title: Unleash TikTok Draft Upload Connector in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update exposes the TikTok connector in the production directory, allowing for account profile access and draft video uploads. The Direct Post feature remains gated pending TikTok review. The connector is now visible and installable, enabling immediate demo recording.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Translations for Global Reach in Nexior 🌍
items.summary: This update replaces English placeholders in Maestro customization controls with verified translations across 16 non-English locales. It also strengthens the i18n CI guard to prevent untranslated keys from being used and ensures that any missing or malformed messages are flagged during validation. The changes enhance user experience by providing localized terminology for various customization options.

items.title: Revamp Price Settings for Enhanced Clarity in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a consolidated Price settings section, combining site-wide markup with custom per-service markup and display overrides. Key changes include the removal of the sample-price UI, improved terminology across 18 locales, and enhanced error handling for save operations. The Price dialog is optimized for mobile and tablet views, ensuring a seamless user experience.

items.title: Enhance TTS Fallback Mechanism in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a fallback mechanism for TTS requests that encounter upstream channel issues, specifically for `s2-pro` requests. It ensures that requests can revert to the legacy audio path while maintaining request semantics and preserving latency. Additionally, the changes include new error handling and regression tests to enhance reliability and performance.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI and WAN CLI for New Specs in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the OpenAI and WAN CLI tools to accommodate recent OpenAPI spec changes. The WAN service now supports multiple reference video URLs for the image-to-video command, while the OpenAI service can handle batch inputs for embeddings. These enhancements improve usability and flexibility for users working with these services.

items.title: Securely Handle Trailing Slash in Application Routes in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the routing issue for application detail views by ensuring both trailing and non-trailing slash URLs direct to the secure ApplicationRetrieveUpdateDestroyViewSet. The changes maintain authentication and permissions while preventing server errors. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate the routing behavior and ensure custom actions are not shadowed.

items.title: Enhance OpenAPI Array Input Contracts in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the OpenAPI specifications by defining the input for OpenAI embeddings as a supported array of strings or tokens, ensuring non-empty entries. Additionally, the `reference_video_urls` field is now correctly specified as a non-empty array of URIs. Regression tests have been added to validate these changes, enhancing the reliability of the API.

items.title: Enhance Input Schema for MCP Tools in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the input schemas for various MCP tools, ensuring better compatibility with OpenAI's API. Key changes include exposing image and embedding inputs as arrays, along with a new schema for reference video URLs. The modifications enhance data handling and maintain backward compatibility with legacy formats.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Remix Reference Previews in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the Maestro remix result cards by displaying the referenced source video above the instructions. It implements a more efficient reference resolution process, adding features like bounded retries, abortable request timeouts, and visible manual retry states to enhance user experience and reliability. Comprehensive tests have been added to ensure functionality and prevent regressions.

items.title: Enhance New Scheduled Task Form Reset in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update ensures that the scheduled task form resets every time the New dialog is opened, preventing any stale edits from affecting new drafts. Additionally, it introduces safeguards against dialog switching during save operations and adds regression tests for the new behavior. These changes improve user experience and reliability in task management.

items.title: Introducing Default-Off Maestro Customization Controls in Nexior 🎛️
items.summary: This update introduces a new compact `Customize` toggle for Maestro, allowing users to control video type, visual style, and voice timbre. The toggle is off by default, ensuring a streamlined experience while preserving user selections locally for easy reactivation. Localization updates have been made across all supported languages to enhance accessibility.

items.title: Enhance Voice Verification Retry Logic in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a retry mechanism for transient voice verification failures when using the OpenAI-HK API. It ensures that retries occur within a strict 115-second budget while preserving genuine validation failures. Additionally, focused regression tests have been added to validate the new logic, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Enhance Artifacts Page with Unified Styling in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update aligns the Artifacts page with the styling of Scheduled Tasks, improving the overall user experience. Key changes include merging duplicate summary cards, enhancing responsive layouts, and implementing count-aware filters. Additionally, accessibility improvements ensure a consistent experience across different devices and themes.

items.title: Enhance Security by Scrubbing Builder Credentials in Wisdom 🔒
items.summary: This update implements a crucial security enhancement by ensuring that builder credentials are scrubbed before creating snapshots. Key changes include the introduction of a Bearer-protected endpoint that securely deletes sensitive information and the validation of token responses. Additionally, comprehensive tests confirm the effectiveness of these modifications, enhancing the overall integrity of the system.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks Background Color in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update modifies the Scheduled Tasks page by enforcing the background color using `!important`. The change ensures that the page background color reliably overrides any inherited styles, improving visual consistency. A single line of SCSS was adjusted in the ScheduledTasks.vue file to implement this fix.

items.title: Streamline Extension by Removing Background Refresh in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the extension by removing the background cookie refresh functionality, including access-token synchronization and various refresh triggers. The extension has been updated to version 0.4.3, retaining only the user-initiated cookie retrieval process. This change simplifies the extension's permissions and improves its overall performance.

items.title: Enhance Service Override Pricing Features in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update refines the service override pricing by displaying public services with optional favicons in the table and picker. It introduces percentage-based markup inputs while maintaining backend compatibility, aligns the layout for create/edit fields, and localizes help text across multiple languages. Additionally, the table now preserves up to two decimal places for percentage displays, enhancing user experience.

items.title: Revert changes to ensure golden builder stability in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the recent changes that removed the .env file at boot, which caused the builder to fail during live testing. The previous implementation allowed for a fallback token, preventing the API from getting stuck during initialization. By restoring the original logic, we aim to enhance the reliability of the golden build process.

items.title: Enhance tenant security by using individual .env files in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical security issue where tenants were inadvertently using a shared golden token instead of their own .env configurations. The fix involves modifying the startup script to delete any snapshot-baked .env file at boot, ensuring that each tenant loads its unique configuration. This change enhances both security and correctness by preventing unauthorized access to the golden database.

items.title: Enhance Site Services with Favicon Picker and Localizable Fields in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a refined service picker that only displays services with a favicon, enhancing the user experience by preventing private services from appearing. Additionally, fine-print markup helpers have been restyled for clarity, and both display name and summary fields now support auto-translation toggles for better localization. Minor adjustments to tip spacing improve overall layout consistency.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks Page Background in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update modifies the Scheduled Tasks page by implementing the `--el-bg-color-page` for the background, ensuring a cohesive look. The task cards now retain the default white color without any additional background overrides. This change improves visual consistency and user experience on the page.

items.title: Add 'Run Now' Button for Scheduled Tasks in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a 'Run Now' button for each scheduled task card, allowing users to trigger tasks immediately without waiting for their scheduled time. The button is strategically placed between the toggle and edit/delete options, enhancing user experience. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for 17 locales, ensuring accessibility for a wider audience.

items.title: Fix golden boot issues and enhance health-gate in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves the fresh-golden failure caused by corrupted non-ASCII bytes in the startup.bat comments, ensuring a successful boot process. Both OEM .bat files have been cleaned to pure ASCII, allowing for proper execution during fresh and in-guest reboots. Additionally, the health-gate has been rewritten to eliminate the use of kubectl exec, improving reliability through a ClusterIP Service and self-curling probe.

items.title: Update Maestro Thumbnail to Full-Bleed Artwork in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the Maestro service-card thumbnail with a new full-bleed Holo artwork, eliminating the previous white-edge issue in the service carousel. The migration ensures that updates only occur if the thumbnail is still the old URL, with a safe rollback mechanism in place. Validation checks confirm the successful implementation of the new thumbnail.

items.title: Empower Hashnode Publishing with Cookie Auth in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new skill for Hashnode that allows users to publish, draft, and manage blog posts using their own login cookies, bypassing the need for a Pro plan. Key features include creating drafts, publishing articles, and handling automoderation warnings. The skill is fully verified and operational, ensuring a seamless experience for users without the Pro subscription.

items.title: Feat(connectors): switch Hashnode to cookie capture (no Pro) in Backend ✨
Revamp Login Mode to Auth Tab for Better Site Config in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update moves the Login Mode setting from the General settings to a newly renamed Auth tab, reflecting its role as a site-wide configuration. The change includes a new selection interface for login methods and removes outdated components, streamlining the user experience. Additionally, internationalization support has been updated to ensure consistency across all locales.

items.title: Revamp Scheduled Tasks Page for a Sleeker Look in Nexior ✨
items.summary: The Scheduled Tasks page has been restyled to enhance visual consistency with the app. Key changes include a white background for the page and grey cards that now sit flat without borders, improving the overall aesthetic. Hover effects have been simplified to maintain a clean user experience.

items.title: Empower Site Admins with Configurable Login Modes in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `login_mode` configuration for site admins, allowing them to choose between a full-page redirect or an iframe popup for user authentication. The default setting is a redirect, but existing iframe preferences are preserved. This change ensures a consistent login experience across all visitors to a site, enhancing usability and control for site administrators.

items.title: Ensure Avatar Stays Perfectly Circular in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses the issue of the avatar rendering as an oval by adding `flex-shrink: 0` to the avatar's CSS. This change ensures that the avatar maintains its intended 40x40 dimensions, preventing any unwanted distortion. The fix has been verified on the live site, confirming the avatar now displays correctly.

items.title: Perfect Circle Avatar & Spacing Aligned with Nexior in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the avatar display by ensuring it maintains a perfect circle shape, regardless of the source image's aspect ratio. Additionally, the dropdown menu spacing has been adjusted to match Nexior's exact styles, enhancing consistency across the platform. Key changes include updated padding and margin values for a cleaner layout.

items.title: Enhance Invoice Title Buttons for Better UX in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: Updated the action buttons on the invoice title cards to solid button styles for improved visual consistency. The changes include modifying the 'Edit', 'Delete', and 'Set Default' buttons to use Element Plus's primary and danger types. This update enhances user interaction without altering any underlying logic or styles.

items.title: Update Hashnode API Endpoint and Auth in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the deprecation of the Hashnode GraphQL API endpoint, switching from `gql.hashnode.com` to `gql-beta.hashnode.com`. It also implements Bearer token authentication for improved security and future-proofing. Additionally, the skill now accurately distinguishes between authentication errors and Pro plan restrictions, providing clear guidance for users.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Apps Table Layout in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update widens the Operation column in the OAuth Apps table from 160px to 200px, providing more space for the Edit and Delete buttons. The change is purely a layout adjustment with no impact on functionality or internationalization. It improves the user interface by reducing button crowding.

items.title: Enhance User Menu to Match Nexior Style in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update refines the user menu in the header to align with Nexior's design standards. Key changes include a rounded floating card, inset menu padding, and a rounded-pill hover effect, all while maintaining existing functionality. The avatar has been removed from the header for a cleaner look, ensuring a seamless integration with Nexior's aesthetic.

items.title: Enhance Golden Build Process for Wisdom in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the installation process by ensuring a clean pod restart after installation. Key changes include modifications to the install script and the golden build workflow, which now waits for an install-complete marker before recreating the builder pod. This ensures that the startup script runs correctly, enabling WeChat and the API to launch seamlessly.

items.title: Boost HTTP Timeout for Smooth Media Uploads in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update raises the HTTP timeout for media uploads in the Skills module, addressing a ReadTimeout issue that occurred during image posting. By implementing a 60-second timeout, the system now accommodates larger uploads without failure. Additionally, the error handling has been improved to provide clearer feedback to users when timeouts occur.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks with Custom Frequency Options in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an advanced schedule builder for scheduled tasks, allowing users to set custom frequencies such as every N minutes, hours, or days, along with a new 'hourly-at-minute' option. A real-time preview feature has been added to enhance usability. Additionally, 17 new localization keys have been integrated across multiple languages to support these features.

items.title: Enhance Live Agent Activity Display in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces real-time agent activity and render percentage details in the Maestro progress checklist. The UI now displays dynamic messages reflecting the agent's current actions, improving user experience during long rendering processes. Key changes include the addition of new telemetry data and updates to the ProgressSteps component for better detail presentation.

items.title: Fix remix freezing and enhance live progress updates in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where the remix process would freeze at 93% during delivery due to misfiring conditions. It also introduces live activity and render progress updates, providing real-time feedback on the rendering process. The changes improve the accuracy of the progress indicators, ensuring users receive truthful updates during video processing.

items.title: Streamlined API Docs Access in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The 'View docs' button in the API code dialog now directs users to the service's documents landing page instead of a specific API doc. This change simplifies the linking process by using the first path segment of the API path to derive the correct document URL. The previous manual mapping of service document aliases has been removed, enhancing maintainability and consistency across services.

items.title: Enhance Task Trace ID Display in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the display of task trace IDs in the Maestro component by reading them from the top-level `trace_id` returned by the `/maestro/tasks` endpoint. It maintains compatibility with legacy `response.trace_id` payloads and includes a new beachball patch change file. The changes have been validated with successful type checks and will be re-evaluated in CI.

items.title: New veo deployment and service added in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a dedicated `platform-service-ttapi-veo` deployment and service, enhancing the production capabilities for `/veo/videos` and `/veo/tasks`. The manifests have been captured in Git, ensuring consistency with the existing deployments while sharing the same MongoDB database for task history continuity. The deployment has already been applied live to the HK cluster and verified for functionality.

items.title: Enable Run Again in API Code Dialog in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the issue where the 'Run again' button in the Maestro API code dialog was unclickable for users. By adding 'maestro' to the PATH_TO_STORE, the dialog can now correctly resolve the API token, allowing the button to function as intended. The change is minimal and does not affect other services.

items.title: Streamline iframe login process in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The login mechanism has been updated to rely solely on the 'Login mode' setting, eliminating the previous feature flag for iframe login. This change simplifies the decision-making process for login methods, ensuring that the default behavior is a full-page redirect unless explicitly set to use the iframe. The feature flag infrastructure remains intact for future use, while unnecessary code related to the old feature flag has been removed.

items.title: Enhance OOBE Resilience with Task Scheduler in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the installation process to ensure that fresh AKS golden builds can complete successfully without being interrupted by OOBE finalization. By re-launching the setup as a Scheduled Task, the process is safeguarded against premature termination, allowing for a smoother installation experience. Additionally, it includes a fallback to inline execution if Task Scheduler is unavailable, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Update wrangler to the latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the wrangler package from version 4.106.0 to 4.108.0, incorporating several minor changes and patch updates. Key improvements include enhanced deployment processes for static Pages and better error handling during non-interactive deployments. Additionally, dependency versions for workerd and @cloudflare/workers-types have been updated to ensure compatibility and performance.
